name: LiqPay
description: LiqPay is a Ukrainian payment platform operated by PrivatBank that provides REST APIs for accepting card payments, creating hosted payment pages, processing subscriptions, managing refunds, sending invoices, and conducting card-to-card transfers. It supports Mastercard, Visa, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Privat24 wallets across 120+ countries, with full fiscalization (RRO) support for Ukrainian merchants.

itemListElement.name: LiqPay Checkout API
itemListElement.description: Server-side API for generating signed payment requests that redirect customers to the LiqPay hosted checkout page. Supports one-time payments, donations, split payments, two-stage holds, and QR-code payments.

itemListElement.name: LiqPay Payment Status API
itemListElement.description: Server-to-server API for retrieving the current status and details of a payment by order ID.

itemListElement.name: LiqPay Subscriptions API
itemListElement.description: API for creating and managing recurring payment subscriptions with daily, weekly, monthly, and yearly billing cycles.

itemListElement.name: LiqPay Refunds API
itemListElement.description: Server-to-server API for initiating full or partial refunds on previously completed payments.

itemListElement.name: LiqPay Invoice API
itemListElement.description: API for generating and sending payment invoices to customers by email or phone number.

itemListElement.name: LiqPay P2P Transfers API
itemListElement.description: API for card-to-card (P2P) money transfers between individuals by card number, card token, Privat24 account, mobile phone, or email.

itemListElement.name: LiqPay Payouts API
itemListElement.description: API for merchant-initiated payouts (credit transfers) to customer cards or accounts, supporting UAH, USD, and EUR.

itemListElement.name: LiqPay Payment Archive API
itemListElement.description: Informational API for retrieving a full archive of accepted payments for reconciliation, reporting, and accounting.

subjectOf.name: Building a Custom Checkout Experience with LiqPay's Payment API
subjectOf.author: Arthur C. Codex
subjectOf.description: A comprehensive guide to implementing a production-ready payment checkout using LiqPay's Payment API.

subjectOf.name: Implementing Secure Payment Processing with LiqPay API
subjectOf.author: Arthur C. Codex
subjectOf.description: A technical guide on integrating LiqPay's payment gateway with emphasis on security best practices and PCI DSS compliance.

subjectOf.name: Handling Payment Notifications and Webhooks with LiqPay API
subjectOf.author: Arthur C. Codex
subjectOf.description: A comprehensive guide to implementing secure webhook handling for LiqPay payment gateway.

subjectOf.name: Managing Recurring Payments and Subscriptions using LiqPay API
subjectOf.author: Arthur C. Codex
subjectOf.description: A guide for implementing subscription-based billing through LiqPay's payment API.
